title: The Disfranchisement of the Negro
venue: James Pott and Company, New York

license.note: Published 1903; public domain in the United States.

abstract: The Disfranchisement of the Negro (1903), by Charles W. Chesnutt. From The Negro Problem.
excerpt: _ By CHARLES W. CHESNUTT In this paper the author presents a straightforward statement of facts concerning the disfranchisement of the Negro in the Southern States. Mr. Chesnutt, who is too well known as a writer to need any introduction to an American audience, puts...
